_meta.description: T001 spike fixture · 20 human-labeled papers · PLACEHOLDER values to be replaced by operator before running eval-harness
_meta.rule: DO NOT run eval-harness with PLACEHOLDER abstracts; operator must fetch real abstracts from arxiv respecting rate limit >= 3s per request (LEG-2)
_meta.harness_compat_note: eval-harness must accept both array-only and {_meta, fixtures:[]} shapes; this file uses the latter
_meta.d3_patch: 2026-04-24: anchor.paperId added (integer) to align VerdictSchema.anchorPaperId:z.number().int(). paperId value = fixture index (f1→1 .. f20→20); operator replaces with real DB paper_id once T003 schema lands and anchors are inserted.
